title: A Kiss for a Killer
writer: François Boyer, James Hadley Chase, Henri Verneuil
actors: Henri Vidal, Mylène Demongeot, Isa Miranda
plot: Betty Farnwell, a rich widow living in Nice, decides to marry Philippe, a good-looking but self-interested man. No sooner has he got married than he meets bewitching young Eve, Betty's niece, and falls for her. Eve becomes his lov...
